entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: An important oilseed crop grown by smallholder farmers in Tanzania

entities.name: TANZANIA
entities.description: The country where groundnut breeding and seed systems are implemented

entities.name: FOLIAR DISEASES
entities.description: Major production constraints affecting groundnut, including rosette, early leaf spot, late leaf spot, and rust

entities.name: ROSETTE
entities.description: A specific foliar disease that constrains groundnut production

entities.description: A specific foliar disease that constrains groundnut production

entities.description: A specific foliar disease that constrains groundnut production

entities.name: RUST
entities.description: A specific foliar disease that constrains groundnut production

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A major environmental production constraint for groundnut

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: A major production constraint affecting groundnut quality and safety

entities.name: LOW SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: A major production constraint affecting groundnut yields

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAM
entities.description: A program aimed at solving production challenges through the development of improved groundnut varieties

entities.name: GENOTYPE BY ENVIRONMENT INTERACTION
entities.description: A biological interaction linked to agronomic practices and molecular tools used in breeding

entities.name: AGRONOMIC PRACTICES
entities.description: Management practices linked to genotype by environment interaction for crop improvement

entities.name: SELECTION MOLECULAR TOOLS
entities.description: Effective tools used in the breeding program to achieve significant achievements

entities.name: HIGH-YIELDING ABILITY
entities.description: The capacity of improved groundnut varieties to produce higher yields, ranging from 1800-2500 kg/ha

entities.name: ROSETTE TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of improved groundnut varieties to withstand rosette disease

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of improved groundnut varieties to withstand drought conditions

entities.name: SEED DELIVERY
entities.description: The process of providing improved seeds to smallholder farmers

entities.description: A project that designed rural seed fairs through NARI to improve seed accessibility

entities.description: The organization through which the Tropical Legumes Project designed rural seed fairs

entities.name: RURAL SEED FAIRS
entities.description: A seed delivery model used to create awareness and increase accessibility for community seed producers
